criteria.title: Checked-in benchmark artifacts are synchronized
criteria.requirement: Benchmark matrix, report, and leaderboard must render from the same checked-in JSON.
criteria.evidence: audit status pass, generated_at 2026-07-09T23:59:34Z
criteria.next_step: Keep the benchmark refresh workflow green and block stale artifacts before release.

criteria.title: Agent coherence benchmark proves behavioral lift
criteria.requirement: Dynamic memory must improve agent task success, avoid stale facts, preserve coherent task runs, and save prompt context against static vector and Chroma-static baselines.
criteria.evidence: WaveMind success 0.917, Chroma static 0.333, Static vector 0.333, stale error 0.000, context saved 0.931, coherent turn rate 0.750, avg latency 2.647 ms
criteria.next_step: Keep agent-behavior quality gated in CI and extend it with LLM answer-quality runs on LoCoMo/LongMemEval.

criteria.title: LongMemEval answer generation beats static RAG baselines
criteria.requirement: A real local LLM answer-generation run must show WaveMind improves final answers, not only retrieval: 50+ LongMemEval questions, stronger answer accuracy/F1 than Chroma and Qdrant static RAG, high evidence recall, and bounded retrieval latency.
criteria.evidence: ollama qwen2.5:1.5b, queries 50, exact 0.240, contains 0.380, token F1 0.333, answered 0.520, grounded 0.520, supported 1.000, unsupported 0.000, faithful 1.000, abstain 0.480, evidence recall 0.920, retrieval 36.586 ms, Chroma F1 0.170, Qdrant F1 0.170
criteria.next_step: Scale this from the checked 50-query local run to full LongMemEval-S with stronger local/API models and faithfulness scoring.

criteria.title: 100k service-backed load profile passes SLO and cost gate
criteria.requirement: recall@10 >= 0.95, p99 <= 100 ms, target QPS capacity available, and cost estimate present.
criteria.evidence: recall 1.0, p99 21.25629998045042 ms, cost $1.39/1M queries
criteria.next_step: Keep the 100k profile green while adding persisted FAISS and pgvector service runs.

criteria.title: 1M service-backed load profile meets recall and p99 SLO
criteria.requirement: recall@10 >= 0.95 and p99 <= 100 ms at 1M vectors.
criteria.evidence: WaveMind faiss-persisted: recall 1.0, p99 57.71490000188351 ms, SLO scale_required
criteria.next_step: Keep FAISS 1M green in CI-capable benchmark environments and continue tuning Qdrant/pgvector service paths.

criteria.title: 1M load result has enough query depth for a production claim
criteria.requirement: Use at least 100 queries for checked-in 1M production claims.
criteria.evidence: current tuned 1M profile uses 100 queries
criteria.next_step: Keep 100+ query depth for all checked-in 1M production profiles.

criteria.title: Persisted FAISS snapshots validate source-of-truth vectors
criteria.requirement: Persisted FAISS must treat SQLite/Postgres as the source of truth, verify id map, vector dimension, vector count, and normalized-vector checksum, then rebuild stale snapshots.
criteria.evidence: source contract _vector_snapshot_checksum + vector_checksum, regression test rebuilds matching-id stale vectors
criteria.next_step: Keep checksum validation in the FAISS persisted path and add the same content-integrity contract to future persisted ANN backends.

criteria.title: pgvector exact and iterative service profile passes 50k tuning gate
criteria.requirement: A real PostgreSQL/pgvector service profile must show exact recall as the correctness floor and iterative HNSW recall@10 >= 0.95 with p99 <= 100 ms at 50000 vectors over 100 queries.
criteria.evidence: size 50000, exact recall 1.0, exact p99 76.98170002549887 ms, iterative recall 0.97, iterative p99 55.18779996782541 ms, Qdrant reference recall 1.0
criteria.next_step: Promote pgvector-iterative into the 100k and 1M production load SLO profiles after allocating enough disk/build time.

criteria.title: Qdrant streaming runner has service smoke and 10M preflight
criteria.requirement: Qdrant must have a memory-bounded streaming runner that inserts vectors in batches, passes a real service smoke, and has a committed 10M plan-only contract with exact reproduction command.
criteria.evidence: smoke vectors 1000, smoke recall 1, smoke p99 17.90370000526309 ms, plan status action_required, plan required local free 0.004 GB, blockers missing_env:WAVEMIND_QDRANT_URL, insufficient_local_disk_for_index_and_transient_batches
criteria.next_step: Run the embedded 10M Qdrant command against a sized Qdrant service and commit production_streaming_load_qdrant_10m_results.json.

criteria.title: Qdrant streaming 1M tuned profile passes recall, p99, and cost gate
criteria.requirement: A real Qdrant service streaming profile at 1M vectors must use safe upsert chunks, warm the service, and meet recall@10 >= 0.95, p99 <= 100 ms, and valid cost SLO over at least 100 queries.
criteria.evidence: cold recall 0.99, cold p99 3013.9777000295 ms, tuned recall 1, tuned p99 26.373000000603497 ms, warmup 100, wait 30.0 s, upsert chunk 2000, SLO pass
criteria.next_step: Promote the same warmup/chunking profile into the checked 10M Qdrant service run on storage sized for the index.

criteria.title: pgvector streaming runner has service smoke and 10M preflight
criteria.requirement: PostgreSQL/pgvector must have a memory-bounded streaming runner that inserts vectors in batches, passes a real service smoke, and has a committed 10M plan-only contract with exact reproduction command.
criteria.evidence: smoke vectors 1000, smoke recall 1, smoke p99 7.623799960128963 ms, plan status action_required, plan required local free 0.004 GB, blockers missing_env:WAVEMIND_PGVECTOR_DSN, insufficient_local_disk_for_index_and_transient_batches
criteria.next_step: Run the embedded 10M pgvector command against a sized PostgreSQL service and commit production_streaming_load_pgvector_10m_results.json.

criteria.title: VectorDBBench custom dataset export is reproducible
criteria.requirement: A public vector-database comparison path must expose train/test/neighbors/scalar-label parquet files for an official VectorDBBench custom dataset run.
criteria.evidence: status ready, vectors 10000, queries 100, files ['neighbors', 'scalar_labels', 'test', 'train']
criteria.next_step: Run this custom dataset through official VectorDBBench targets for Qdrant, Milvus, pgvector, and WaveMind-backed FAISS/Qdrant profiles.

criteria.title: Namespace placement survives node and zone loss
criteria.requirement: Replicated namespace placement must keep availability at 1.0 under node and zone loss simulation.
criteria.evidence: node loss 1.0, zone loss 1.0, namespaces 4096
criteria.next_step: Validate the same placement under live multi-node service load.

criteria.title: Cluster autoscaler plans node additions within headroom
criteria.requirement: Autoscale planning must convert target memories, RF, and per-node capacity into required node count, bounded target load, and a complete rolling namespace movement plan with quorum, checkpoint, repair, and validation safeguards.
criteria.evidence: current 4, required 50, target max 678711, moves 4094+0, rebalance ready, batches 82, write quorum 2
criteria.next_step: Connect rolling rebalance execution to operator reconciliation status and real HPA/load metrics.

criteria.title: Control-plane consensus blocks split-brain config changes
criteria.requirement: Cluster membership and operator config changes must require a majority leadership lease, reject stale leaders, reject stale config revisions, and block minority partitions.
criteria.evidence: voters 3 -> 5, term 1 -> 2, revision 2, minority blocked True
criteria.next_step: Wrap the same majority lease/revision contract around remote operator membership changes.

criteria.title: 100M-memory capacity envelope is planned across a large cluster
criteria.requirement: The production plan must include a deterministic 100M-memory capacity envelope with 100+ nodes, RF=3, node/zone-loss availability, balanced placement, and bounded per-node storage.
criteria.evidence: 100000000 memories, 128 nodes, RF 3, replica skew 1.09375, max storage/node 5.806214176118374 GB
criteria.next_step: Promote this envelope from deterministic planning to a real 100M service-backed Qdrant/pgvector/FAISS load run on sized hardware.

criteria.title: Kubernetes operator passes a real multi-node failover drill
criteria.requirement: Operator output must include CRD, StatefulSet, Service, HPA, scheduled repair, capacity-aware replica reconciliation, a bounded rebalance ConfigMap with full rolling namespace-move plan metadata, Memory OS CronJob plan/run scheduling with Redis/shared-lock safety, production admission wiring for 10M+ targets, redundant operator replicas with Kubernetes Lease/etcd leader election, resourceVersion CAS, and cross-node anti-affinity, a traceable multi-node Kubernetes CI failure drill with leader takeover, post-failover reconcile, PDB/topology protection, pod replacement, CR-driven rolling upgrade, non-loopback pod-DNS quorum traffic through a physical worker outage, and API recovery, and status conditions for readiness/autoscaling/capacity/rebalance/repair/Memory OS/production admission plus control-plane consensus safety.
criteria.evidence: CRD True, HPA True, repair True, memory OS True, operator replicas 2, leader election True via coordination.k8s.io/v1, kind nodes 4, failure drill pass, Lease transitions 1, recovered API True, PDB min available 3, topology constraints 2, rolling pods replaced 4, upgraded API True, workflow https://github.com/CaspianG/wavemind/actions/runs/29057247023, network drill pass via docker-pause-kind-worker, service nodes 4, zones 3, outage recall 1.0, failed nodes ['wavemind-ci-0'], recovery recall 1.0, network workflow https://github.com/CaspianG/wavemind/actions/runs/29057247023, rebalance config True, rebalance ready 4048 moves/81 batches, replicas 34, required 34, target max 678711, status Ready, memory OS ready True, production admission ready True, control-plane True
criteria.next_step: Repeat the same drill against a non-ephemeral remote Kubernetes staging cluster and feed its service endpoints into strict cluster admission.

criteria.title: Serverless plan externalizes state and validates KEDA target
criteria.requirement: Serverless mode must use external durable state, external vector index, shared cache, valid KEDA scale target, scale-to-zero-safe workers, an operational SLO/cold-start/cost profile, and an observed-telemetry contract for real cluster load tests.
criteria.evidence: Postgres True, Qdrant True, Redis True, required replicas 4, burst rps 256000, cold start 1220.0 ms, cost $81.76, observed source loopback-api-capacity-estimate, observed replicas 4, observed pool rps 583.26, observed p99 17.039 ms, observed errors 0.0
criteria.next_step: Run the same profile against a real Knative/KEDA cluster and replace loopback telemetry with remote p95/p99/cold-start/error-rate/scale-out metrics.

criteria.title: Hot cache and query-audit prewarm work
criteria.requirement: Frequently recalled memory paths must be cacheable and prewarmable.
criteria.evidence: hit rate 0.92, prewarm hit True, p99 0.014099998224992305 ms
criteria.next_step: Keep local cache prewarm green while Redis carries multi-worker production cache evidence.

criteria.title: Query-vector cache avoids repeated encoder work
criteria.requirement: Repeated hot queries must reuse encoded query vectors locally across Redis-backed workers, and through the FastAPI service before hitting the vector index.
criteria.evidence: local encode calls 1, local hit rate 0.995, Redis shared True, Redis encode calls 1, service encode calls 1, service hit rate 0.995, service p99 11.885699997947086 ms, service metrics True
criteria.next_step: Run the same service-mode vector-cache profile with a real sentence-transformer encoder on a larger API load test.

criteria.title: Batch query API amortizes service recall overhead
criteria.requirement: FastAPI must support production batch recall so agents can issue many memory lookups with one HTTP request while preserving vector-cache reuse.
criteria.evidence: queries 100, HTTP requests 100 -> 1, batch encode calls 1, batch hit rate 0.99, speedup 6.296683035844507, metrics True
criteria.next_step: Keep the real Redis multi-process batch recall profile green, then repeat it with larger batches on remote Kubernetes/serverless nodes.

criteria.title: Redis-compatible shared rate limiter works across workers
criteria.requirement: Production API workers must enforce one shared request budget through Redis instead of separate per-process in-memory buckets.
criteria.evidence: workers 2, allowed 4, limited 1, shared True
criteria.next_step: Run the same shared limiter profile against a live Redis service in multi-worker API load tests.

criteria.title: Redis-compatible shared cache and Memory OS prewarm work
criteria.requirement: Production cache must be shareable across workers, support query-audit prewarm, support Memory OS prewarm, guard adaptive Memory OS mutation cycles with a Redis-compatible single-flight lock, learn observed follow-up query transitions, apply explicit useful/not-useful recall feedback, invalidate a namespace after memory changes, and preserve architecture advice for production-scale deployments.
criteria.evidence: shared True, prewarm hit True, Memory OS warmed 2, predictive warmed 6, transition hit True, transition queries ['risk limits'], transition edge True, feedback events 8, lock acquired True, busy skipped True, Memory OS hit True, invalidation True, architecture architecture_required
criteria.next_step: Keep the real Redis multi-process API load workflow green.

criteria.title: API cache does not serve stale memory after mutations
criteria.requirement: FastAPI workers must invalidate shared query cache on remember, feedback, and forget so mutations cannot leave stale cached recall.
criteria.evidence: cached True, remember invalidation True, remember stale prevented True, feedback invalidation True, feedback demoted True, forget invalidation True, forget stale prevented True
criteria.next_step: Keep the real Redis multi-process API load workflow green.

criteria.title: Batch recall feedback updates priority, audit, and cache
criteria.requirement: Production agents must record recall feedback in batches, reject bad namespace items, update positive and negative memory priority, write audit events, and invalidate shared cache once per affected namespace.
criteria.evidence: accepted 2, rejected 1, cache warmed True, cache invalidated True, audit 2, positive delta 0.55, negative delta -0.25, p99 1.8449999988661148 ms
criteria.next_step: Exercise the same batch feedback endpoint under multi-worker Redis API load.

criteria.title: Real Redis multi-process API load passes SLO
criteria.requirement: CI must start a real Redis service, launch multiple uvicorn workers, verify cross-process cache visibility, and fail on stale-cache, batch feedback, batch recall, shared query-vector cache, or p99 SLO regression.
criteria.evidence: workflow True, workers 2, success_rate 1.0, p99 38.7309649924282 ms, batch accepted 2, batch rejected 1, batch cache invalidated True, batch query True, batch HTTP 12 -> 1, batch vector hits 12.0, batch p99 331.59499999601394 ms, stale prevented True
criteria.next_step: Scale this Redis-backed batch recall profile to more workers, larger batch sizes, and remote Kubernetes/serverless API nodes.

criteria.title: Real local HTTP cluster smoke passes SLO
criteria.requirement: CI must start multiple real localhost WaveMind API processes with isolated SQLite stores and run the sustained HTTP cluster workload through the same service-mode client used for remote nodes.
criteria.evidence: workflow True, nodes 4, read_fanout 1, success 1.0, failover 1.0, repair 1, health True, degraded 0, p99 348.82529999595135 ms, slo True
criteria.next_step: Refresh local_http_cluster_smoke_results.json from CI on every release candidate.

criteria.title: Real HTTP active-active service-region smoke passes SLO
criteria.requirement: CI must start real WaveMind API region processes backed by replicated local runtimes, exchange namespace deltas over HTTP export/import endpoints, converge without duplicate replay, and propagate deletes.
criteria.evidence: workflow True, regions 3, namespaces 2, pair_syncs 36, convergence 1.0, delete suppression 1.0, success 1.0, final noop 0, p99 347.5829000817612 ms, slo True
criteria.next_step: Refresh local_http_active_active_smoke_results.json from CI on every release candidate.

criteria.title: Memory OS worker prewarms, consolidates, and cleans up
criteria.requirement: Background intelligence must turn audited hot queries, observed query transitions, and explicit user recall feedback into exact and predictive prewarm actions, usage-pattern priority boosts, adaptive forgetting, cleanup, durable concept memories, production architecture advice, and typed self-improvement suggestions with evidence.
criteria.evidence: hot queries 2, prewarm 2, predictive warmed 6, transition hit True, transition queries ['risk limits'], transition edge True, expired 1, concepts 1, feedback events 8, priority predictions 2, forgetting demotions 4, architecture architecture_required, suggestions 12 ['service-index-and-sharding', 'review-consolidated-concepts', 'predictive-prefetch-active', 'priority-learning-active', 'adaptive-forgetting-active', 'architecture:scale-plan', 'architecture:service-index', 'architecture:namespace-sharding', 'architecture:production-controls', 'architecture:replication-capacity', 'architecture:load-test', 'architecture:multimodal-payloads']
criteria.next_step: Surface typed suggestions in Studio/operator dashboards and keep usage-pattern priority prediction and adaptive forgetting green under Redis-backed service deployments.

criteria.title: Distributed sharding repairs replicas and tombstones stale deletes
criteria.requirement: Replicated writes, missing-record repair, tombstone repair, and anti-entropy must all pass.
criteria.evidence: repair 1, tombstone deleted 1, anti-entropy repaired 1
criteria.next_step: Keep the algorithm profile and real HTTP shard profile in sync.

criteria.title: HTTP shard transport handles failover, repair, and tombstones
criteria.requirement: Real localhost API shard nodes must pass quorum write, failover query, missing-replica repair, proxy-safe HTTP transport, tombstone cleanup, and concurrent namespace traffic.
criteria.evidence: proxy bypass True, failover True, repair 1, tombstone deleted 1, concurrent hit rate 1.0
criteria.next_step: Extend the same HTTP shard profile to remote service nodes and sustained load.

criteria.title: Sustained HTTP cluster load survives failover and repair
criteria.requirement: The HTTP cluster path must survive a mixed write/query/failover/repair/forget workload across multiple namespaces and real API nodes.
criteria.evidence: nodes 4, writes 8, queries 8, failover hit 1.0, success 1.0, p99 891.74 ms
criteria.next_step: Repeat this profile against remote service nodes and larger namespace counts before claiming full distributed production scale.

criteria.title: Runtime replica quorum survives node loss
criteria.requirement: Quorum runtime must recall after node loss, repair missing records and tombstones, and survive concurrent read/write traffic.
criteria.evidence: recall after loss True, repair copied 1, p99 3.497999998216983 ms, concurrent hit rate 1.0
criteria.next_step: Extend the same replicated runtime profile to remote service nodes and sustained load.

criteria.title: Active-active sync and field-state CRDT converge
criteria.requirement: Multi-region memory deltas and field state must converge without duplicate amplification or full-namespace replay on incremental sync, and CRDT deltas must carry actor watermarks so regions can audit sync progress, missing actors, and replication lag. A non-loopback Kubernetes drill must also prove that surviving regions continue writes and tombstone convergence during a physical zone outage, then converge the recovered PVC-backed region without resurrecting deleted memory.
criteria.evidence: delta sync True, incremental records 1, field-only keys 1, sustained regions 3, sustained convergence 1.0, sustained delete suppression 1.0, sustained success 1.0, HTTP service-region convergence 1.0, HTTP final no-op imports 0, Kubernetes regions 3, zones 3, failure docker-pause-kind-worker, outage unavailable ['region-b'], outage writes 32, outage convergence 1.0, outage delete suppression 1.0, recovery convergence 1.0, recovery delete suppression 1.0, region workflow https://github.com/CaspianG/wavemind/actions/runs/29058433643, CRDT idempotent True, watermarks 3, watermark health pass, missing detected True, lag detected True
criteria.next_step: Repeat the passing kind region-failure protocol on independent remote Kubernetes regions and feed that artifact into strict active-active admission.

criteria.title: Snapshots, archives, offsite mirror, and object-store DR verify
criteria.requirement: Backups must be checksummed, restorable, offsite-capable, recover recall after restore, and support SQLite point-in-time recovery from an append-only mutation journal plus database-native Postgres PITR runbook/preflight coverage.
criteria.evidence: archive True, object-store DR True, restored files 3, PITR full True, PITR point True, journal entries 5, deleted 2, Postgres PITR ready, commands 7, env missing_env
criteria.next_step: Repeat the drill with real S3-compatible storage, larger SQLite journals, then execute the Postgres PITR runbook against a staging or managed Postgres service and commit the drill report.

criteria.title: Structured and multimodal payload retrieval works
criteria.requirement: Images, audio, video, 3D assets, tables, temporal events, and graph facts must be storable, retrievable through the same memory API, queryable through a shared cross-modal embedding space, returned with provenance, and compatible with externally computed multimodal vectors. Temporal events must support actor filters, interval overlap, around-time reranking, recency reranking, persistence, and provenance. Large media assets must be backed by verified content-addressed object-store manifests. Knowledge graphs must support entity/predicate filters, multi-hop path traversal, persistence, and provenance. External multimodal encoders must pass a precomputed-vector contract that checks global retrieval, target-modality routing, persisted finite normalized vectors, provenance, and vector separation margin. Active cross-modal encoders must also pass health monitoring for finite normalized payload/query vectors, target routing, p95 encode latency, dimension compatibility, and separation margin.
criteria.evidence: modalities image, audio, table, event, video, 3d, graph, precision@1 1.0, cross-modal precision@1 1.0, vectors persisted 1.0, precomputed precision@1 1.0, encoder contract True, encoder global@1 1.0, encoder target@1 1.0, encoder margin 0.8113164444259024, encoder health True, encoder health global@1 1.0, encoder health query p95 1.5152499952819198 ms, provenance 1.0, temporal precision@1 1.0, temporal around/window/recency/interval 1/1/1/1, temporal persisted 1.0, temporal provenance 1.0, knowledge graph precision@1 1.0, knowledge graph direct/two-hop/three-hop/predicate 1/1/1/1, knowledge graph paths 1.0, knowledge graph persisted 1.0, knowledge graph provenance 1.0, asset manifest verified True, asset provenance 1
criteria.next_step: Run the same encoder contract and encoder-health check with real CLIP/audio/video/3D vectors from production encoders, then expand the multimodal, temporal-event, and knowledge-graph retrieval profiles against larger object-store-backed corpora.

criteria.title: 10M-vector production load profile passes recall, p99, and cost gate
criteria.requirement: A real non-skipped 10M-vector service-backed benchmark must meet recall@10 >= 0.95, p99 <= 100 ms, and valid cost SLO before claiming 10M readiness.
criteria.evidence: WaveMind faiss-ivfpq-persisted streaming: recall 0.99, p99 60.12930005090311 ms, cost valid_slo
criteria.next_step: Keep the 10M compressed FAISS IVF-PQ profile green and repeat with Qdrant/pgvector service profiles when larger service hardware is available.

criteria.title: 50M streaming load run has a checked preflight contract
criteria.requirement: The next 50M streaming run must have a committed plan-only artifact with exact reproduction command, local index/transient storage estimates, application-storage estimate, required env, and an explicit boundary that it is not a completed benchmark.
criteria.evidence: WaveMind faiss-ivfpq-persisted streaming: status action_required, index 1.12 GB, app storage 119.209 GB, required local free 1.523 GB, blockers missing_env:WAVEMIND_FAISS_IVFPQ_PATH, insufficient_local_disk_for_index_and_transient_batches
criteria.next_step: Set WAVEMIND_FAISS_IVFPQ_PATH on sized storage and run the embedded 50M command to produce production_streaming_load_ivfpq_50m_results.json.

criteria.title: Architecture advisor blocks unsafe large production growth
criteria.requirement: Advisor must convert live stats plus 10M production targets into service-index, namespace-sharding, load-test, production-controls, and multimodal readiness actions.
criteria.evidence: status architecture_required, recommendations active-active-region-evidence, bounded-read-fanout, capacity-envelope, load-test, multimodal-payloads, namespace-sharding, production-controls, scale-plan, service-index, commands 13
criteria.next_step: Keep `wavemind advise --fail-on action_required` in release and deployment preflight checks.
